raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation to check the artifact centrally includes whether the stated thesis and contribution framing cohere with the paper's own described benchmark and findings.","R1.2":"Logical consistency is load-bearing because the artifact appears to shift from instruction-following as the bottleneck to translation quality as the main conclusion.","R1.3":"Evidence-claim alignment is central because the artifact makes production-readiness and benchmark-scope claims from reported BLEU, COMET, and fluency results.","R1.4":"Novelty assessment is central because the artifact repeatedly claims firstness and system-level quality crossover positioning.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is always active because the projection must preserve limits imposed by the artifact and delegation.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is always active because checking this artifact implicates strong claims about firstness, production deployment, and community priorities.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is always active because the agent must project responsibilities without performing the requested check itself.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is always active because overconfident validation of MT deployment claims could affect real production or research decisions.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is always active because the projection must remain grounded in the provided delegation and verbatim artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation to check the artifact centrally includes whether the stated thesis and contribution framing cohere with the paper's own described benchmark and findings.
rationale.R1.2: Logical consistency is load-bearing because the artifact appears to shift from instruction-following as the bottleneck to translation quality as the main conclusion.
rationale.R1.3: Evidence-claim alignment is central because the artifact makes production-readiness and benchmark-scope claims from reported BLEU, COMET, and fluency results.
rationale.R1.4: Novelty assessment is central because the artifact repeatedly claims firstness and system-level quality crossover positioning.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is always active because the projection must preserve limits imposed by the artifact and delegation.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is always active because checking this artifact implicates strong claims about firstness, production deployment, and community priorities.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is always active because the agent must project responsibilities without performing the requested check itself.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is always active because overconfident validation of MT deployment claims could affect real production or research decisions.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is always active because the projection must remain grounded in the provided delegation and verbatim artifact.
